label: Psychic ritual -- summon animals
description: Ritual that summons wild animals from the biome. Some may be manhunters depending on ritual quality.

manhunterSpawnChanceFromQualityCurve.label: Manhunter spawn chance from quality curve
manhunterSpawnChanceFromQualityCurve.description: Curve mapping ritual quality to the chance that summoned animals are manhunters.

animalsAllowed.label: Animals allowed
animalsAllowed.description: Runtime flag overwritten by InitializeCast -- not meaningful to set in XML. Tracks whether the current biome has eligible wild animals.
